name: ISHARES TRUST
summary: The iShares MSCI ACWI ETF seeks to track the investment results of an index composed of large- and mid-capitalization developed and emerging market equities. It provides exposure to a broad range of global stocks in both developed and emerging markets. The ETF is managed by BlackRock and headquartered in San Francisco, CA.

name: INVESCO ACTIVELY M
summary: The Invesco Active REIT ETF is an actively managed fund that invests in real estate investment trusts (REITs) across various property sectors. The fund aims to outperform traditional REIT indexes by using a proprietary, fundamental, bottom-up approach to select securities. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: VANGUARD BD IDX FD
summary: The Vanguard Total Bond Market ETF seeks to track the performance of a broad, market-weighted bond index. It invests in a wide spectrum of public, investment-grade, taxable, fixed income securities in the United States, including U.S. Treasuries, agency securities, and corporate bonds. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Malvern, Pennsylvania.

name: VANGUARD CHARLOTTE
summary: The Vanguard Total International Bond ETF seeks to track the performance of a broad, market-weighted index of investment-grade international bonds, excluding the U.S. dollar-denominated bonds. It provides exposure to a diverse range of investment-grade, fixed-income securities issued in various countries outside the United States. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Charlotte, North Carolina.

name: Global X Autonomous  Electric V
summary: The Global X Autonomous & Electric Vehicles ETF seeks to invest in companies involved in the development of autonomous vehicle technology, electric vehicles, and related components and materials. This includes companies that produce autonomous driving software, electric vehicle batteries, and other crucial technologies for the sector. Global X ETFs is headquartered in New York, NY.

name: FIDELITY COMMWLTH
summary: The Fidelity Nasdaq Composite ETF seeks to track the performance of the Nasdaq Composite Index. It invests in a broad range of stocks listed on the Nasdaq stock market. The ETF is managed by Fidelity and is headquartered in Boston, MA.

name: INVESCO EXCHG TRAD
summary: The Invesco NASDAQ Internet ETF tracks the performance of companies listed on NASDAQ that are engaged in internet-related businesses. The fund aims to provide investors with exposure to the dynamic and rapidly evolving internet sector, including companies involved in e-commerce, online content, and internet infrastructure. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCHG TRAD
summary: The Invesco FTSE RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid ETF seeks to track the investment results of the FTSE RAFI US 1500 Small-Mid Index. The fund generally invests in small and mid-sized U.S. companies based on fundamental measures such as book value, cash flow, sales and dividends. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Staples ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the consumer staples sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). It includes companies that manufacture or distribute products related to food, beverages, household goods, and personal products. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Consumer Discretionary ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the consumer discretionary sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). This sector includes businesses that tend to perform well when the economy is growing and consumers are confident and willing to spend. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Energy ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the energy sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). It focuses on companies involved in the exploration, production, refining, and transportation of oil, gas, and coal. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Financials ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the financials sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). The fund invests in companies involved in banking, insurance, asset management, and other financial services. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Industrials ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the industrials sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). It includes companies involved in aerospace and defense, construction, engineering, and manufacturing. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Information Technology ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the information technology sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). The fund includes companies involved in software, hardware, semiconductors, and IT services. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: INVESCO EXCH TRDII
summary: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Utilities ETF tracks the performance of small-capitalization U.S. companies in the utilities sector, as defined by the Global Industry Classification Standard (GICS). It includes companies that provide electricity, gas, and water services. The ETF is managed by Invesco and is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: ALPS ETF TRUST
summary: The ALPS Active REIT ETF is an actively managed ETF focused on investing in publicly traded real estate investment trusts (REITs). It aims to provide investors with exposure to the real estate sector through a diversified portfolio of REITs. ALPS is headquartered in Denver, CO.

name: CREDIT SUISSE NASS
summary: CREDIT SUISSE NASS is focused on providing investors with access to silver through the use of exchange traded notes. The ETN provides a return linked to the performance of the spot price of silver, less investor fees. Credit Suisse is a global financial services company, headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.

name: PROCURE ETF TR II
summary: The Procure Space ETF seeks to track the performance of companies involved in the space industry. This includes companies that manufacture satellites and rockets, provide space-based services, and are involved in the exploration and utilization of space. The ETF allows investors to gain exposure to companies that are expected to benefit from the growing space economy.

name: CREDIT SUISSE NASS
summary: CREDIT SUISSE NASS is focused on providing investors with access to crude oil through the use of exchange traded notes. The ETN provides a return linked to the performance of the spot price of oil, less investor fees. Credit Suisse is a global financial services company, headquartered in Zurich, Switzerland.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Intermediate-Term Corporate Bond ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted corporate bond index with an intermediate-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The ETF invests in investment-grade U.S. corporate bonds and aims to provide current income. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Long-Term Corporate Bond ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted corporate bond index with a long-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The ETF invests in investment-grade U.S. corporate bonds and aims to provide current income. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Short-Term Corporate Bond ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted corporate bond index with a short-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The fund invests in investment-grade U.S. corporate bonds and seeks to provide current income with lower volatility than longer-term bond funds. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Intermediate-Term Treasury ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of investment-grade U.S. Treasury bonds with an intermediate-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The ETF provides exposure to U.S. government bonds with maturities between 3 and 10 years. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Long-Term Treasury ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of investment-grade U.S. Treasury bonds with a long-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The ETF provides exposure to U.S. government bonds with maturities greater than 10 years. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Short-Term Treasury ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of investment-grade U.S. Treasury bonds with a short-term dollar-weighted average maturity. The ETF provides exposure to U.S. government bonds with maturities between 1 and 3 years. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD WHITEHALL
summary: The Vanguard International Dividend Appreciation ETF seeks to track the performance of an index of international companies that have a history of increasing dividends. It focuses on providing exposure to dividend-paying stocks in developed and emerging markets, excluding the United States. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Whitehall, Pennsylvania.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Mortgage-Backed Securities ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of investment-grade mortgage-backed securities. The fund invests primarily in agency mortgage-backed pass-through certificates guaranteed by Ginnie Mae, Fannie Mae, and Freddie Mac. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 1000 ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 1000 Index, which represents the largest 1,000 companies in the U.S. equity market. It provides broad exposure to large-cap U.S. stocks, allowing investors to participate in the growth of the overall market. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 1000 Growth ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 1000 Growth Index, which represents the growth-oriented companies within the Russell 1000 Index. It focuses on providing exposure to large-cap U.S. stocks with higher growth potential. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 1000 Value ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 1000 Value Index, which represents the value-oriented companies within the Russell 1000 Index. It focuses on providing exposure to large-cap U.S. stocks that are considered undervalued. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: INVESCO ACTIVELY M
summary: The Invesco Active Investment Grade Corporate Bond ETF is an actively managed ETF focusing on investment-grade corporate bonds. The fund seeks to outperform its benchmark through active security selection and duration management. Invesco is headquartered in Atlanta, GA.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Target Retirement 2045 Fund seeks to provide capital appreciation and current income consistent with its current asset allocation. The fund invests in a mix of Vanguard's underlying stock and bond funds, with allocations adjusted over time to become more conservative as the target retirement date approaches. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Total World Stock ETF seeks to track the performance of the FTSE Global All Cap Index, which represents stocks of large-, mid-, and small-cap companies located in developed and emerging markets. It provides broad exposure to the global stock market, allowing investors to participate in the growth of economies worldwide. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD MALVERN F
summary: The Vanguard Short-Term Inflation-Protected Securities ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of inflation-protected public obligations of the U.S. government that have a remaining maturity of less than five years. It invests in Treasury Inflation-Protected Securities (TIPS) and provides inflation protection for investors. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Malvern, Pennsylvania.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 2000 Growth ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 2000 Growth Index, which represents the growth-oriented companies within the Russell 2000 Index. It focuses on providing exposure to small-cap U.S. stocks with higher growth potential. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 2000 ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 2000 Index, which represents small-cap U.S. companies. It provides broad exposure to the small-cap segment of the U.S. equity market, allowing investors to participate in the growth of smaller, emerging companies. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD SCOTTSDAL
summary: The Vanguard Russell 2000 Value ETF seeks to track the performance of the Russell 2000 Value Index, which represents the value-oriented companies within the Russell 2000 Index. It focuses on providing exposure to small-cap U.S. stocks that are considered undervalued. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Scottsdale, Arizona.

name: VANGUARD WHITEHALL
summary: The Vanguard Emerging Markets Government Bond ETF seeks to track the performance of a market-weighted index of U.S. dollar-denominated government bonds issued by emerging market countries. It provides exposure to the fixed-income market of developing nations. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Whitehall, Pennsylvania.

name: VANGUARD WHITEHALL
summary: The Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF seeks to track the performance of an index of international stocks, excluding the U.S., with high dividend yields. It focuses on providing income to investors through a diversified portfolio of dividend-paying stocks in developed and emerging markets. The fund is managed by Vanguard and is headquartered in Whitehall, Pennsylvania.
